notes: H002-pivot: SmolVLM-500M i1-Q4_0 (mradermacher imatrix build). AWQ blocked: CUDA required for calibration. i1-Q4_0 = imatrix-calibrated uniform INT4; 245MB LM vs Q4_K_M 289MB (-15%). GGUF: artifacts/experiments/smolvlm-q4-0/SmolVLM-500M-Instruct.i1-Q4_0.gguf. Hypothesis: uniform INT4 Metal kernel dispatch faster than mixed k-quants. Expected: TPS +5-15%, Mem -5-10%, quality neutral.
instructions: 1. Copy SmolVLM-500M-Instruct.i1-Q4_0.gguf into VLMHarness Xcode bundle. 2. Add PBXFileReference + build file for 'SmolvlmQ4K0' model entry (same mmproj). 3. In ContentView.swift add: ModelEntry(id='SmolVLM-Q4K0', ggufName='SmolVLM-500M-Instruct.i1-Q4_0', mmprojName='mmproj-SmolVLM-500M-Instruct-Q8_0', chatTemplate='smolvlm', hfId='HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-500M-Instruct', quantization='i1-Q4_0'). 4. Build & deploy to iPhone 16 Pro. Select SmolVLM-Q4K0 tab. Run Measurement. 5. Export JSON. Call ExperimentRunner.import_iphone_results(experiment_id, path).
